result.status_detail: PII warning rendered with 차단 via page-replacement (WS dispatch); W4+W6 regression PASS

notes: DEFAULT logged-in Chrome, dedicated --new-window. Confirmed login (user 최장희), clipboard round-trip OK, composer value verified before submit. After submit+120s, page title changed 채팅|M365 Copilot -> M365 Copilot (page-replacement Option C build_warning_page_response). DOM warning text: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)' Expected '차단' present. Option C page-replacement + WS dispatch preserved after W4 (Option B page-injection removal) + W6 (diagnostic dump cleanup). No console errors observed.
